stemHtml: While flying on NAT Track Z at FL360, you experience severe turbulence and decide to deviate 20 NM to the left of track. Due to a HF radio failure you cannot reach ATC immediately, so what is your first action?

options.b: Deviate immediately, then broadcast on VHF blind on 121.5 and 123.45 with your intentions.
options.c: Maintain track and altitude until HF contact established—deviation without clearance is prohibited.
options.d: Climb or descend 300 ft and offset 15 NM as per standard contingency.
